name: personal-blog-website
description: A simple and dynamic personal blog website for sharing thoughts, ideas, and projects. Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, focusing on learning, growth, and web development.
author: Osmund Million

scripts.start: parcel src/html/main.html src/html/posts.html src/html/about.html src/html/contact.html src/html/login.html src/html/registration.html
scripts.build: parcel build src/html/main.html src/html/posts.html src/html/about.html src/html/contact.html src/html/login.html src/html/registration.html --dist-dir dist
